text: {"question_text": "Quick check — please confirm your CGPA and family income tier so I can shortlist the right scholarships.", "expected_response_type": "text", "context_hint": "DOSM brackets: B40 < RM 4,850/month, M40 RM 4,850-10,960, T20 > RM 10,960. Yayasan UM normally requires CGPA >= 3.30 but considers hardship cases below."}
